# 颜色选择器 Color Picker

## API

### DEFAULT_COLOR_GROUP

```typescript
const DEFAULT_COLOR_GROUP: ColorParam[][] = [
  [N00, B400, G500, P500, '#FFFD00', R500],
  [N100, B100, G100, P100, Y100, R200],
  [N300, B200, G300, P300, Y400, R400],
  [N500, B500, G600, P600, Y500, R600],
  [N700, B600, G800, P800, Y600, R800],
  [N900, B800, G900, P900, Y800, R900],
];
```
